name: Hawala / hundi informal remittance
description: Value moved outside the formal banking channel via informal brokers; major risk given large diaspora.
redFlags: Inbound/outbound flows with no corresponding bank settlement; customer references 'agent' for delivery; mismatched sender/receiver relationship; round-amount FX.

name: Trade-based ML (over/under-invoicing)
description: Mis-priced or phantom RMG/import-export trade used to move value.
redFlags: Invoice value inconsistent with goods/market price; payments to third-party not on invoice; goods routed via high-risk transit.

name: Inbound remittance layering
description: Legitimate migrant-worker remittance corridors abused to inject illicit funds.
redFlags: Remittance volume inconsistent with stated occupation; many senders to one beneficiary; rapid cash-out.

name: Mobile financial services structuring
description: bKash/Nagad-type wallets & agent networks used for smurfing.
redFlags: Many small loads just under reporting/KYC tiers; rapid wallet-to-wallet hops; agent self-dealing.

name: NPO / charity abuse for TF
description: Charitable conduits used to raise/move funds for terrorism.
redFlags: Donations routed to conflict regions; opaque beneficiaries; cash-intensive collections.

name: PEP / corruption proceeds
description: Embezzlement and bribery proceeds laundered domestically and offshore.
redFlags: Government-linked customer; wealth inconsistent with role; use of family nominees.

name: Parallel-market FX / currency smuggling
description: Black-market currency dealing and cross-border cash given FX controls.
redFlags: Demand for large cash FX; rates off official; structuring around FX limits.

name: Hawala informal transfer
description: Informal value transfer bypassing banks.
redFlags: No bank settlement leg; 'agent' delivery references.

name: Trade-based ML
description: Mis-invoiced imports/exports.
redFlags: Price/quantity mismatch; third-party payers; transit via high-risk ports.

name: Remittance-corridor abuse
description: Large worker-remittance inflows used to layer funds.
redFlags: Sender/beneficiary mismatch; many-to-one patterns.

name: Antiquities / cultural-property proceeds
description: Smuggled antiquities monetised through the system.
redFlags: Dealings in cultural goods; cash settlement; vague provenance.

name: Regional terrorist financing
description: Funds raised/moved for regional terrorist activity.
redFlags: Transfers to conflict-adjacent areas; cash collection networks.

name: Corruption / PEP proceeds
description: Public-sector embezzlement laundered via nominees.
redFlags: State-linked customers; unexplained wealth.

name: Cyber-enabled fraud & investment scams
description: Scam proceeds funnelled through mule accounts/wallets.
redFlags: Rapid in-out; many unrelated payers; accounts opened then immediately funded & drained; device/IP anomalies.

name: Illegal online gambling proceeds
description: Unlicensed gambling settled through MSBs and e-wallets.
redFlags: Frequent small credits from gaming-linked sources; payouts to many beneficiaries.

name: Grand corruption (1MDB-type) layering
description: Misappropriated public funds layered via shells & offshore.
redFlags: Complex layering; offshore SPVs; high-value assets.

name: Trade-based ML / free-zone abuse
description: Mis-invoicing and free-zone transit.
redFlags: Price mismatch; circular trade; FTZ re-routing.

name: Drug-trafficking proceeds (regional transit)
description: Narcotics proceeds via cash & MSBs.
redFlags: Cash-heavy; border-region nexus.

name: Real estate & luxury-goods laundering
description: Proceeds parked in property/luxury assets.
redFlags: Third-party funding; rapid resale; under/over-valuation.

name: Cross-border worker remittance abuse
description: Migrant corridors used for layering.
redFlags: Sender/beneficiary mismatch; many-to-one.

name: Cash economy & structuring
description: Large informal cash economy enables smurfing.
redFlags: Repeated sub-threshold cash; layered deposits.

name: Hawala-type informal transfer
description: Informal value transfer networks.
redFlags: No bank settlement; 'agent' delivery.

name: Drug-trafficking (cannabis) proceeds
description: Cannabis cultivation/export proceeds laundered.
redFlags: Cash-heavy; northern-region nexus; rapid asset purchase.

name: Smuggling / enclave-border trade
description: Contraband proceeds via border trade.
redFlags: Goods/cash inconsistent with declared trade.

name: Real estate & tourism laundering
description: Proceeds invested in property/tourism developments.
redFlags: Third-party funding; valuation anomalies.

name: Regional / Sahel terrorist financing
description: Funds for regional terrorist activity.
redFlags: Transfers toward Sahel; cash collection.

name: Remittance-corridor abuse
description: Diaspora remittances used to layer funds.
redFlags: Sender/beneficiary mismatch.

name: Hawala / hundi
description: Dominant informal value-transfer system.
redFlags: No bank leg; 'agent' settlement; FX-rate arbitrage.

name: Terrorist financing
description: Heightened TF risk and supervisory focus.
redFlags: Transfers to listed/conflict areas; charity conduits; cash collection.

name: Proliferation financing
description: Sanctions/PF-evasion exposure.
redFlags: Dual-use goods trade; front companies; sanctioned-nexus counterparties.

name: Trade-based ML / mis-invoicing
description: Mis-priced trade to move value.
redFlags: Price/quantity mismatch; third-party payers.

name: Cash economy & structuring
description: Large undocumented cash economy.
redFlags: Sub-threshold cash patterns.

name: NPO / charity misuse
description: Charity conduits for TF.
redFlags: Opaque beneficiaries; conflict-region disbursement.

name: Remittance-corridor abuse
description: Large worker-remittance inflows layered.
redFlags: Sender/beneficiary mismatch; many-to-one.

name: Cyber fraud, romance & investment scams
description: Scam proceeds laundered via mules, wallets & remittance.
redFlags: Rapid in-out; many unrelated payers; new account quickly drained.

name: Offshore/online gaming (POGO-type) proceeds
description: Online-gaming operations used to launder & move value.
redFlags: Gaming-linked counterparties; bulk payouts; foreign-worker payroll anomalies.

name: Casino-related laundering
description: Junket/casino channels layer funds.
redFlags: Chip purchases with minimal play; third-party cash-out.

name: Drug-trafficking proceeds
description: Narcotics proceeds via cash & MSBs.
redFlags: Cash-heavy; structuring.

name: OFW remittance abuse
description: Overseas-worker remittance corridors layered.
redFlags: Sender/beneficiary mismatch; many-to-one; rapid cash-out.

name: Corruption / plunder proceeds
description: Public-fund misuse laundered via nominees.
redFlags: State-linked customers; unexplained wealth.

name: Human-trafficking proceeds
description: Trafficking & exploitation proceeds.
redFlags: Payments tied to recruitment fees; victim-linked accounts.

name: Layering of foreign criminal proceeds
description: Hub status exploited to layer offshore proceeds.
redFlags: Foreign-sourced funds with weak economic rationale; rapid pass-through.

name: Complex structures / shell & nominee arrangements
description: Opaque corporate layers obscure beneficial ownership.
redFlags: Multiple SPVs; nominee directors; circular ownership.

name: Foreign PEP & high-net-worth flows
description: Foreign PEP wealth routed through private banking/family offices.
redFlags: PEP nexus; large unexplained inflows; reluctance to evidence source of wealth.

name: Real estate & luxury-asset laundering
description: High-value property/assets (cf. 2023 case).
redFlags: Third-party/foreign funding; cash component; rapid purchase.

name: Trade-based ML / trade finance
description: Mis-invoicing through trade-finance hub.
redFlags: Document/price mismatch; circular trade; round-tripping.

name: Digital-payment-token / crypto flows
description: DPT/crypto used to move/layer value.
redFlags: On/off-ramp bursts; unhosted-wallet exposure; chain-hopping.

name: Correspondent banking & sanctions evasion
description: Cross-border nested relationships & evasion.
redFlags: Nested/ shell correspondents; sanctioned-nexus routing.

name: Trade-based ML (re-export hub)
description: Mis-invoicing & re-export trade move value.
redFlags: Price/quantity mismatch; third-party payers; circular/transit trade.

name: Gold & precious-metals value transfer
description: Gold/DPMS used to store & move value.
redFlags: Bullion settlement; cash-for-gold; weight/value mismatch.

name: Real estate laundering
description: Property used to park proceeds.
redFlags: Cash/third-party funding; rapid flip; under/over-valuation.

name: Free-zone & shell-company misuse
description: Free-zone entities obscure ownership/flows.
redFlags: Opaque BO; no real substance; circular invoicing.

name: Hawala & cash couriering
description: Informal transfer & bulk-cash movement.
redFlags: No bank leg; bulk cash; 'agent' settlement.

name: Sanctions & proliferation-financing evasion
description: Front companies & dual-use trade evade sanctions.
redFlags: Sanctioned-nexus counterparties; dual-use goods; rerouting.

name: Foreign PEP / illicit foreign proceeds
description: Foreign PEP wealth routed in.
redFlags: PEP nexus; unexplained foreign inflows.

name: Sanctions evasion — Russia / Iran nexus
description: Turkey's geographic and trade position exploited for Russia and Iran sanctions evasion; dual-use goods and parallel-import schemes routed via Turkish intermediaries.
redFlags: Dual-use goods routing; third-country re-export; front/shell companies; sanctioned-counterparty nexus; post-2022 volume spikes.

name: Trade-based ML (Istanbul transit hub)
description: Istanbul's position as a major trade-transit hub used for mis-invoiced trade — gold, textiles and electronics predominate.
redFlags: Price/quantity mismatch; circular trade; third-party payers; gold-settlement anomalies; high-risk counterparties.

name: Hawala / informal exchange-office network
description: Exchange houses and informal hawala networks used for value transfer, especially in diaspora and cross-border trade corridors.
redFlags: No bank settlement leg; 'agent' delivery references; FX-rate arbitrage; customer references exchange-office settlement.

name: Remittance-corridor abuse
description: Diaspora remittance corridors (to/from Europe, Gulf, Central Asia) abused to layer funds.
redFlags: Sender/beneficiary mismatch; many-to-one patterns; volume inconsistent with stated occupation; rapid cash-out.

name: Crypto / virtual-asset layering
description: High crypto adoption used for layering; on/off-ramp through Turkish exchanges and P2P markets.
redFlags: Bursty on/off-ramp; chain-hopping; unhosted-wallet exposure; mismatch with customer profile.

name: Corruption / PEP proceeds
description: Public-sector embezzlement and bribery proceeds laundered through nominee structures and real estate.
redFlags: State/government-linked customer; wealth inconsistent with public role; nominee structures; real-estate purchase anomalies.

name: NPO / charity misuse for TF
description: Non-profit organisations used as conduits for terrorist financing, particularly toward regional conflict zones.
redFlags: Donations routed to conflict regions; opaque beneficiaries; cash-intensive collections; nexus to designated organisations.

name: Hawala / underground banking (fei-ch'ien)
description: Underground banking and informal value-transfer networks serve the large unbanked population and diaspora corridors.
redFlags: No bank settlement leg; 'agent' delivery; FX-rate arbitrage; customer references agent settlement.

name: Predicate crime proceeds (narcotics / illegal logging)
description: Proceeds from narcotics trafficking and illegal logging/mining laundered through cash-intensive businesses.
redFlags: Cash-heavy deposits; business income inconsistent with declared activity; border/remote-region nexus; rapid asset acquisition.

name: E-wallet / digital-payment fraud proceeds
description: Scam and fraud proceeds funnelled through the highly-penetrated e-wallet ecosystem (GoPay, OVO, Dana).
redFlags: Rapid in-out; many unrelated payers; newly opened account quickly drained; device/IP anomalies; velocity inconsistent with profile.

name: TF / regional extremist financing (JI / IS-linked)
description: Elevated TF risk from domestic extremist networks with regional affiliations (JI, IS-aligned groups).
redFlags: Transfers to conflict-adjacent regions; charity conduits; small structured collections; nexus to designated groups.

name: Crypto / virtual-asset layering
description: Growing crypto market used for layering; on/off-ramp through Indonesian exchanges and P2P platforms.
redFlags: Bursty on/off-ramp; chain-hopping; unhosted-wallet exposure; profile mismatch.

name: OFW remittance-corridor abuse
description: Overseas-worker remittance corridors (to/from Malaysia, Middle East, East Asia) abused to layer funds.
redFlags: Sender/beneficiary mismatch; many-to-one patterns; inconsistent with stated occupation; rapid cash-out.

name: Funnel accounts & structuring
description: Multiple individuals deposit cash into accounts controlled by one person to aggregate and transfer funds while evading CTR thresholds.
redFlags: Many unrelated depositors to one account; sub-$10,000 cash structuring; rapid aggregation then wire; round-number deposits.

name: Romance / pig-butchering scam proceeds
description: Investment and romance scam proceeds laundered through MSBs, P2P payments, crypto and funnel accounts.
redFlags: Inbound from many unrelated payers; account opened then quickly drained; victim-pattern flows; crypto bridging; inconsistent with customer profile.

name: Business email compromise (BEC) wire fraud
description: BEC proceeds wired through domestic accounts and converted via MSBs, crypto or international transfers.
redFlags: Sudden large wire from new counterparty; account recently opened; inconsistent with business pattern; multiple hop accounts.

name: Digital asset / crypto layering & VASP exposure
description: Illicit funds layered via VASPs, mixers, chain-hopping and on/off-ramp services; DPRK, ransomware and scam-linked wallet exposure.
redFlags: Frequent fiat↔crypto conversion; mixer/sanctioned-wallet exposure; chain-hopping; structuring around VASP limits; unhosted-wallet activity.

name: Money mule networks
description: Recruited or complicit individuals receive and forward criminal proceeds, obscuring the trail across accounts.
redFlags: Account funded by many unrelated parties then forwarded; profile inconsistent with volume; reluctance to explain; rapid in-out; job-offer linked.

name: Professional money laundering / CMLN
description: Criminal Money Laundering Networks (CMLNs) provide fee-based laundering services to multiple criminal organisations via complex account webs.
redFlags: Rapid pass-through across entities; no business rationale; multiple industries; professional enablers; circular fund movement.

name: Sanctions & proliferation-financing evasion (DPRK / Iran / Russia)
description: DPRK cyber-theft proceeds, Iranian shadow banking, and Russia export-control evasion routed through US financial system via front companies and nested correspondents.
redFlags: Sanctioned-nexus counterparties; dual-use goods routing; complex nested account chains; stated purpose inconsistent with counterparty profile.
